title: CMCDv2 Custom Keys Registry
description: Schema for the machine-readable list of registered CMCDv2 custom keys. Property names align with CMCD spec Table 1 (lowercase-first camelCase).

keyName.description: Full key for transmission (Key Name per CMCD spec), e.g. org.svta.a-ad.

keyNameAbbr.description: Abbreviation suffix only, e.g. a-ad. Pattern: namespaceAbbr-fieldAbbr.

description.description: Human-readable field meaning (Description per CMCD spec), e.g. audio-description.

valueDefinition.description: Short purpose/definition of the key (Value definition per CMCD spec).

typeAndUnit.description: Value type (Type & Unit per CMCD spec). Custom keys MUST be string or token; values max 64 characters.

headerName.description: Header name per CTA-5004-A Section 3.1 (Header field definition).

example.description: Optional example value (max 64 characters per CMCD spec).

added.description: Date the key was added to the registry (YYYY-MM-DD).

source.description: Optional link to the GitHub issue or discussion.
